category_sources: Official BBOT docs and README describe BBOT as a scanner for recon, bug bounties, and attack surface management.
display_name_sources: Official documentation is titled BBOT Docs.
docs_sources: Official BBOT docs site provides user and developer manuals; official README links to Getting Started docs.
repo_sources: Official BBOT docs header links to blacklanternsecurity/bbot.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official README says BBOT automates recon, bug bounties, and ASM.
Official docs include scanning, presets, modules, and API keys sections.
